Reading: State

Recovery 81 • Sleep 65 • Strain 100%

Read
The fresh log barely changes the nutrition picture: a light add-on, not a real catch-up, after a day that has already carried heavy output. Recovery looks supportive, but the intake gap still favors restraint over intensity, with muscle preservation depending on a stronger protein finish.

Underfed, but not depleted.
